programme.title: If We Built It Today
programme.desc: According to the Bible, Noah's Ark was a world-changing engineering feat, and it took cutting-edge construction to build it; experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as difficult.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: The MV Resolution, a self-elevating support system ship, is designed to install gigantic wind turbines on the bottom of the sea.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: The world's largest nuclear-powered aircraft carrier, the U.S.S. Nimitz has a crew of more than 3,000 as well as an air wing with more than 2,000 personnel.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: See how the world's biggest mining ship hunts for diamonds and then processes them amid tight security.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: The maiden voyage of the Oasis of the Seas, the largest, most revolutionary cruise ship in the world.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: The USS Kentucky, an Ohio-Class ballistic nuclear-powered submarine, is virtually undetectable.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: The Cristobal Colon is to dredge sand from the sea floor for a super port in Cuxhaven, Germany.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: Africa Mercy, the largest non-governmental hospital ship, delivers medical care to regions with polluted water or no power.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: SOL Airlines Flight 5428 nosedives into a remote desert, instantly killing everyone on board. Argentine investigators scour the scattered and scorched debris, but find nothing out of the ordinary.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: A helicopter carrying offshore oil workers crashes into the ocean off the coast of Newfoundland and a far-reaching investigation reveals a fatal flaw.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: A turboprop crashes into an Indonesian mountain; while three systems could have prevented it, investigators must figure out why none of them did.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: When an African airliner mysteriously crashes, Namibian investigators rule out a host of possible causes before reaching a chilling conclusion.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: A brand-new 737 falls from the sky over West Africa during a major storm, but investigators eventually discover weather had nothing to do with it.

programme.title: If We Built It Today
programme.desc: Rome's aqueducts are one of the greatest engineering marvels in history, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge construction to build them; experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building them a second time would be as deadly.
